description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a black canvas upper, white stitching, and a white rubber sole. The shoe features a distinctive flame graphic in yellow, orange, and red along the side panels, with a white wave-shaped stripe overlaying the flames. The laces are white and threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern through metal eyelets. The toe cap and heel are reinforced, and the heel has a small red rectangular patch, likely a brand label. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for casual wear. The shoe is clean and shows no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A black low-top sneaker with a white sole, white laces, and a bold flame graphic in yellow, orange, and red on the sides. The shoe features a white wave stripe and a red brand patch on the heel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white laces, black toe cap, and white stitching.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flame graphic, white wave stripe, and clean white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reinforced heel and a red rectangular patch at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view with the flame graphic and white wave stripe, mirroring the left side.
attribute_logo: Red rectangular patch on the heel, white wave stripe on the side
